title: Speech-Language Pathology Assistant
description: Mount Sinai Health, a prestigious academic medical center, seeks a Speech-Language Pathology Assistant to support patient care and clinical excellence. Working onsite in Pittsburgh, you'll assist SLPs with therapy delivery, patient interaction, and clinical documentation. This role offers direct patient impact and the opportunity to develop skills in a leading medical institution.
responsibilities: Assist speech-language pathologists with patient evaluations and therapy sessions
Support patient exercises and communication activities under SLP supervision
Maintain accurate clinical documentation and progress notes
Educate patients and families on therapeutic strategies
Maintain equipment and prepare therapy materials
Contribute to a patient-centered, collaborative care environment

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; Associate degree in related field preferred
skills: Ability to follow treatment plans accurately
Willingness to learn and develop clinical skills

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Shift flexibility and paid time off
